scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:lib
scripts.bundle:openclaw:all: npm run bundle:openclaw && npm run bundle:openclaw-plugins
scripts.tauri:build:win: CI=false NSIS_PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin/makensis PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" tauri build --runner cargo-xwin --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --config src-tauri/tauri.windows.conf.json
scripts.tauri:build:win:arm64: CI=false NSIS_PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin/makensis PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" tauri build --runner cargo-xwin --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc --config src-tauri/tauri.windows.conf.json
